projectDescription: جستجوپذیر یک پلتفرم بهینه‌سازی جستجوی هوش مصنوعی است که به برندها، آژانس‌ها و سازمان‌ها کمک می‌کند دیدپذیری خود را در موتورهای جستجوی هوش مصنوعی مانند ChatGPT و Claude ردیابی، تحلیل و بهبود دهند.
keyFeatures: AI Visibility Tracking — monitor how your brand appears in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and other AI search engines
LLM Analytics — understand how large language models rank and recommend your content
AEO Insights — track AI citation events and see exactly which pages get cited
Content Management & Optimization — optimize content for AI discoverability with actionable recommendations
On-Page Optimization — improve titles, descriptions, and headings for AI search
Prompt Library — organize and research prompts; find which prompts drive best results
AI Shopping Analytics — track product recommendations in AI shopping results
MCP Protocol Integration — connect Seorchable data to Claude and other MCP clients
AI Search Agent — automated AI agent that continuously analyzes your search data
Competitive Analysis — compare your AI search performance against competitors
Real-Time Alerts — instant notifications when rankings change or new opportunities arise
Enterprise SSO & Role Management — SAML 2.0, OpenID Connect, fine-grained role access
Multi-Account Management — manage hundreds of client accounts from one dashboard
publicApiSurface: MCP Protocol endpoint — connect Seorchable analytics to Claude and MCP clients
API Key management — create and manage API keys for automated integrations
Analytics data API — access real-time visibility and ranking data
